final_prompt.prompt:
Create an architectural visualization render of a modern minimalist villa perched on a tropical coastal cliff.

Style/medium: architectural visualization render, professional photorealistic CGI, clean lines and refined surfaces
Composition: three-point perspective, wide-angle establishing shot, camera positioned at elevated viewpoint overlooking sea
Subject: pure white fair-faced concrete villa with floor-to-ceiling glass curtain walls, seamless indoor-outdoor integration
Scene/backdrop: tropical coastal cliff setting, infinity pool extending from terrace to visually merge with sea horizon, distant sailboats on water, dramatic sunset sky with spectacular clouds
Lighting/mood: golden hour sunset, warm orange-red light reflecting on pool surface, soft ambient glow, luxurious resort atmosphere
Color palette: warm orange and coral sunset tones against cool white concrete and blue sea, lush green tropical foliage as accent
Materials/textures: smooth white concrete with subtle aggregate texture, reflective glass panels, teak wood lounge furniture, rippling water surface
Avoid: cartoonish rendering, oversaturated colors, artificial lighting artifacts, cluttered composition, generic stock photo aesthetic
